global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery at a special price.

elements.label: yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: food images
elements.description: Three rectangular images of food items are displayed in a row, showcasing delicious meals with a glossy finish.

elements.label: food image
elements.description: A rectangular image of a food item, featuring a vibrant dish that looks appetizing and fresh.

elements.label: food image
elements.description: Another rectangular image of a different food item, displaying a colorful and appealing meal.

elements.label: food image
elements.description: A rectangular image of yet another food item, showcasing a tasty dish with rich colors.

elements.label: food icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing a food item, designed with a simple and clean aesthetic.

elements.label: food icon
elements.description: A small rectangular icon representing another food item, featuring a minimalist design.

elements.label: food icon
elements.description: A small rectangular icon of a food item, designed with a straightforward and appealing look.

elements.label: main offer text
elements.description: Bold text at the bottom of the ad reads 'Hungry? We got you $4.99', emphasizing the offer with a clear and engaging font.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you $4.99r0 Shop now

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' is displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern and friendly font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge in the top right corner, designed with a contrasting color to attract attention.
